## Checklist

- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` passes
- [ ] `npx expo lint` passes
- [ ] Tested on a device or emulator
- [ ] Persistence still goes through `src/data/entriesRepository.ts` (no direct SQL in screens)
- [ ] Uses theme tokens / existing primitives; no off-device data or tracking added
